472	        private static IEnumerable<T> BreadthFirstSearch<T>(IEnumerable<T>                      startingGroup,
473	                                                            Func<T, HashSet<T>, IEnumerable<T>> getNextGroup)
474	        {
475	            var found    = startingGroup.ToHashSet();
476	            var toSearch = new Queue<T>(found);
477	
478	            while (toSearch.Count > 0)
479	            {
480	                var searching = toSearch.Dequeue();
481	                yield return searching;
482	                foreach (var nextNode in getNextGroup(searching, found))
483	                {
484	                    found.Add(nextNode);
485	                    toSearch.Enqueue(nextNode);
486	                }
487	            }
488	        }

491	            => BreadthFirstSearch(Enumerable.Repeat(module, 1),

494	                                                           .Select(r => r.Parent)

670	        /// <summary>
671	        /// Copy the entry from the opened zipfile to the path specified.
672	        /// </summary>
673	        /// <returns>
674	        /// Path of file or directory that was created.
675	        /// May differ from the input fullPath!
676	        /// Throws a FileExistsKraken if we were going to overwrite the file.
677	        /// </returns>
678	        internal static string? InstallFile(ZipFile          zipfile,
679	                                            ZipEntry         entry,
680	                                            string           fullPath,
681	                                            bool             makeDirs,
682	                                            IFileManager     txFileMgr,
683	                                            string[]         candidateDuplicates,
684	                                            IProgress<long>? progress)
685	        {
686	            if (entry.IsDirectory)
687	            {
688	                // Skip if we're not making directories for this install.
689	                if (!makeDirs)
690	                {
691	                    log.DebugFormat("Skipping '{0}', we don't make directories for this path", fullPath);
692	                    return null;
693	                }
694	
695	                // Windows silently trims trailing spaces, get the path it will actually use
696	                fullPath = Path.GetDirectoryName(Path.Combine(fullPath, "DUMMY")) is string p
697	                    ? CKANPathUtils.NormalizePath(p)
698	                    : fullPath;
699	
700	                log.DebugFormat("Making directory '{0}'", fullPath);
701	                txFileMgr.CreateDirectory(fullPath);
702	            }
703	            else
704	            {
705	                log.DebugFormat("Writing file '{0}'", fullPath);
706	
707	                // ZIP format does not require directory entries
708	                if (makeDirs && Path.GetDirectoryName(fullPath) is string d)
709	                {
710	                    log.DebugFormat("Making parent directory '{0}'", d);
711	                    txFileMgr.CreateDirectory(d);
712	                }
713	
714	                // We don't allow for the overwriting of files. See #208.
715	                if (txFileMgr.FileExists(fullPath))
716	                {
717	                    throw new FileExistsKraken(fullPath);
718	                }
719	
720	                // Snapshot whatever was there before. If there's nothing, this will just
721	                // remove our file on rollback. We still need this even though we won't
722	                // overwite files, as it ensures deletion on rollback.
723	                txFileMgr.Snapshot(fullPath);
724	
725	                // Try making hard links if already installed in another instance (faster, less space)
726	                foreach (var installedSource in candidateDuplicates)
727	                {
728	                    try
729	                    {
730	                        HardLink.Create(installedSource, fullPath);
731	                        return fullPath;
732	                    }
733	                    catch
734	                    {
735	                        // If hard link creation fails, try more hard links, or copy if none work
736	                    }
737	                }
738	
739	                try
740	                {
741	                    // It's a file! Prepare the streams
742	                    using (var zipStream = zipfile.GetInputStream(entry))
743	                    using (var writer = File.Create(fullPath))
744	                    {
745	                        // Windows silently changes paths ending with spaces, get the name it actually used
746	                        fullPath = CKANPathUtils.NormalizePath(writer.Name);
747	                        // 4k is the block size on practically every disk and OS.
748	                        byte[] buffer = new byte[4096];
749	                        progress?.Report(0);
750	                        StreamUtils.Copy(zipStream, writer, buffer,
751	                                         // This doesn't fire at all if the interval never elapses
752	                                         (sender, e) => progress?.Report(e.Processed),
753	                                         UnzipProgressInterval,
754	                                         entry, "InstallFile");
755	                    }
756	                }
757	                catch (DirectoryNotFoundException ex)
758	                {
759	                    throw new DirectoryNotFoundKraken("", ex.Message, ex);
760	                }
761	            }
762	            // Usually, this is the path we're given.
763	            // Sometimes it has trailing spaces trimmed by the OS.
764	            return fullPath;
765	        }

1	using System;
2	using System.Linq;
3	using System.Collections.Generic;
4	using System.ComponentModel;
5	
6	using Newtonsoft.Json;
7	
8	using CKAN.Configuration;
9	using CKAN.Games;
10	using CKAN.Versioning;
11	using CKAN.Extensions;
12	
13	namespace CKAN
14	{
15	    public abstract class RelationshipDescriptor : IEquatable<RelationshipDescriptor>
16	    {
17	        public bool MatchesAny(IReadOnlyCollection<CkanModule>              modules,
18	                               IReadOnlyCollection<string>?                 dlls,
19	                               IDictionary<string, UnmanagedModuleVersion>? dlc)
20	            => MatchesAny(modules, dlls, dlc, out CkanModule? _);
21	
22	        public abstract bool MatchesAny(IReadOnlyCollection<CkanModule>              modules,
23	                                        IReadOnlyCollection<string>?                 dlls,
24	                                        IDictionary<string, UnmanagedModuleVersion>? dlc,
25	                                        out CkanModule?                              matched);
26	
27	        public abstract bool WithinBounds(CkanModule otherModule);
28	
29	        public abstract List<CkanModule> LatestAvailableWithProvides(IRegistryQuerier                 registry,
30	                                                                     StabilityToleranceConfig         stabilityTolerance,
31	                                                                     GameVersionCriteria?             crit,
32	                                                                     IReadOnlyCollection<CkanModule>? installed = null,
33	                                                                     IReadOnlyCollection<CkanModule>? toInstall = null);
34	
35	        public abstract CkanModule? ExactMatch(IRegistryQuerier                 registry,
36	                                               StabilityToleranceConfig         stabilityTolerance,
37	                                               GameVersionCriteria?             crit,
38	                                               IReadOnlyCollection<CkanModule>? installed = null,
39	                                               IReadOnlyCollection<CkanModule>? toInstall = null);
40	
41	        public override bool Equals(object? other)
42	            => Equals(other as RelationshipDescriptor);
43	
44	        public abstract bool Equals(RelationshipDescriptor? other);
45	
46	        public static bool operator ==(RelationshipDescriptor? left,
47	                                       RelationshipDescriptor? right)
48	            => Equals(left, right);
49	
50	        public static bool operator !=(RelationshipDescriptor? left,
51	                                       RelationshipDescriptor? right)
52	            => !Equals(left, right);
53	
54	        public abstract override int GetHashCode();
55	
56	        public abstract bool ContainsAny(IEnumerable<string> identifiers);
57	
58	        public abstract bool StartsWith(string prefix);
59	
60	        public virtual string ToStringWithCompat(IRegistryQuerier registry,
61	                                                 IGame            game)
62	            => ToString() ?? "";
63	
64	        [JsonProperty(NullValueHandling = NullValueHandling.Ignore)]
65	        public string? choice_help_text;
66	
67	        /// <summary>
68	        /// If true, then don't show recommendations and suggestions of this module or its dependencies.
69	        /// Otherwise recommendations and suggestions of everything in changeset will be included.
70	        /// This is meant to allow the KSP-RO team to shorten the prompts that appear during their installation.
71	        /// </summary>
72	        [JsonProperty(DefaultValueHandling = DefaultValueHandling.IgnoreAndPopulate)]
73	        [DefaultValue(false)]
74	        public bool suppress_recommendations;
75	
76	        // virtual ToString() already present in 'object'
77	    }
78	
79	    public class ModuleRelationshipDescriptor : RelationshipDescriptor
80	    {
81	        [JsonProperty(NullValueHandling = NullValueHandling.Ignore)]
82	        public ModuleVersion? max_version;
83	
84	        [JsonProperty(NullValueHandling = NullValueHandling.Ignore)]
85	        public ModuleVersion? min_version;
86	
87	        // The identifier to match
88	        public string name = "";
89	
90	        [JsonProperty(NullValueHandling = NullValueHandling.Ignore)]
91	        public ModuleVersion? version;
92	
93	        public override bool WithinBounds(CkanModule otherModule)
94	            // See if the real thing is there
95	            => otherModule.identifier == name ? WithinBounds(otherModule.version)
96	                                              // See if anyone else "provides" the target name
97	                                              // Note that versions can't be checked for "provides"
98	                                              : (otherModule.provides?.Contains(name) ?? false);
99	
100	        /// <summary>
101	        /// Returns if the other version satisfies this RelationshipDescriptor.
102	        /// If the RelationshipDescriptor has version set it compares against that.
103	        /// Else it uses the {min,max}_version fields treating nulls as unbounded.
104	        /// Note: Uses inclusive inequalities.
105	        /// </summary>
106	        /// <param name="other"></param>
107	        /// <returns>True if other_version is within the bounds</returns>
108	        public bool WithinBounds(ModuleVersion? other)
109	            // UnmanagedModuleVersions with unknown versions always satisfy the bound
110	            => other == null
111	               || (other is UnmanagedModuleVersion unmanagedModuleVersion
112	                   && unmanagedModuleVersion.IsUnknownVersion)
113	               || (version?.Equals(other)
114	                          ?? ((min_version == null || min_version <= other)
115	                              && (max_version == null || max_version >= other)));
116	
117	        /// <summary>
118	        /// Check whether any of the modules in a given list match this descriptor.
119	        /// NOTE: Only proper modules and DLC can be checked for versions!
120	        ///       DLLs match all versions, as do "provides" clauses.
121	        /// </summary>
122	        /// <param name="modules">Sequence of modules to consider</param>
123	        /// <param name="dlls">Sequence of DLLs to consider</param>
124	        /// <param name="dlc">DLC to consider</param>
125	        /// <param name="matched">The first module that matched, if any</param>
126	        /// <returns>
127	        /// true if any of the modules match this descriptor, false otherwise.
128	        /// </returns>
129	        public override bool MatchesAny(IReadOnlyCollection<CkanModule>              modules,
130	                                        IReadOnlyCollection<string>?                 dlls,
131	                                        IDictionary<string, UnmanagedModuleVersion>? dlc,
132	                                        out CkanModule?                              matched)
133	        {
134	            // DLLs are considered to match any version
135	            if (dlls != null && dlls.Contains(name))
136	            {
137	                matched = null;
138	                return true;
139	            }
140	
141	            // .AsParallel() makes this slower, too many threads
142	            matched = modules.FirstOrDefault(WithinBounds);
143	            if (matched != null)
144	            {
145	                return true;
146	            }
147	
148	            return dlc != null && dlc.TryGetValue(name, out UnmanagedModuleVersion? dlcVer)
149	                               && WithinBounds(dlcVer);
150	        }
151	
152	        public override List<CkanModule> LatestAvailableWithProvides(IRegistryQuerier                 registry,
153	                                                                     StabilityToleranceConfig         stabilityTolerance,
154	                                                                     GameVersionCriteria?             crit,
155	                                                                     IReadOnlyCollection<CkanModule>? installed = null,
156	                                                                     IReadOnlyCollection<CkanModule>? toInstall = null)
157	            => registry.LatestAvailableWithProvides(name, stabilityTolerance,
158	                                                    crit, this, installed, toInstall);
159	
160	        public override CkanModule? ExactMatch(IRegistryQuerier                 registry,
161	                                               StabilityToleranceConfig         stabilityTolerance,
162	                                               GameVersionCriteria?             crit,
163	                                               IReadOnlyCollection<CkanModule>? installed = null,
164	                                               IReadOnlyCollection<CkanModule>? toInstall = null)

content.text: I found the likely failure path in `RelationshipResolver.ResolveStanza`: optional recommendations/suggestions that conflict are skipped unless `proceed_with_inconsistencies` is enabled, and dependency discovery later filters recommendations based on whether their parent is included in `Dependencies()`, so conflicting optional modules can affect which later optional rows are surfaced. I’ll add a focused temporary regression test around optional conflicts and then adjust the resolver behavior.

13	    using RelationshipCache = ConcurrentDictionary<RelationshipDescriptor, ResolvedRelationship>;

15	    [Flags]
16	    public enum OptionalRelationships
17	    {
18	        None            = 0,
19	        Recommendations = 1,
20	        Suggestions     = 2,
21	        AllSuggestions  = 4,
22	    }
23	
24	    public class ResolvedRelationshipsTree
25	    {
26	        public ResolvedRelationshipsTree(IReadOnlyCollection<CkanModule> modules,
27	                                         IRegistryQuerier                registry,
28	                                         IReadOnlyCollection<string>     dlls,
29	                                         IReadOnlyCollection<CkanModule> installed,
30	                                         StabilityToleranceConfig        stabilityTolerance,
31	                                         GameVersionCriteria             crit,
32	                                         OptionalRelationships           optRels)
33	        {
34	            resolved = ResolveManyCached(modules, registry, dlls, installed, stabilityTolerance, crit, optRels, relationshipCache).ToArray();
35	        }

37	        public static IEnumerable<ResolvedRelationship> ResolveModule(CkanModule                      module,
38	                                                                      IReadOnlyCollection<CkanModule> definitelyInstalling,
39	                                                                      IReadOnlyCollection<CkanModule> allInstalling,
40	                                                                      IRegistryQuerier                registry,
41	                                                                      IReadOnlyCollection<string>     dlls,
42	                                                                      IReadOnlyCollection<CkanModule> installed,
43	                                                                      StabilityToleranceConfig        stabilityTolerance,
44	                                                                      GameVersionCriteria             crit,
45	                                                                      OptionalRelationships           optRels,
46	                                                                      RelationshipCache               relationshipCache)
47	            => ResolveRelationships(module, module.depends, new SelectionReason.Depends(module),
48	                                    definitelyInstalling, allInstalling, registry, dlls, installed, stabilityTolerance, crit, optRels, relationshipCache)
49	                .Concat((optRels & OptionalRelationships.Recommendations) == 0
50	                    ? Enumerable.Empty<ResolvedRelationship>()
51	                    : ResolveRelationships(module, module.recommends, new SelectionReason.Recommended(module, 0),
52	                                           definitelyInstalling, allInstalling, registry, dlls, installed, stabilityTolerance, crit, optRels, relationshipCache))
53	                .Concat((optRels & OptionalRelationships.Suggestions) == 0
54	                    ? Enumerable.Empty<ResolvedRelationship>()
55	                    : ResolveRelationships(module, module.suggests, new SelectionReason.Suggested(module),
56	                                           definitelyInstalling, allInstalling, registry, dlls, installed, stabilityTolerance, crit, optRels, relationshipCache));
57	
58	        public IEnumerable<ResolvedRelationship[]> Unsatisfied()
59	            => resolved.SelectMany(rr => rr.UnsatisfiedFrom());
60	
61	        public IReadOnlyList<CkanModule> Candidates(RelationshipDescriptor          rel,
62	                                                    IReadOnlyCollection<CkanModule> installing,
63	                                                    IRegistryQuerier                registry,
64	                                                    IGame                           game)
65	        {
66	            var candidates = new List<CkanModule>();
67	            var unresolved = new List<ResolvedRelationship[]>();
68	            switch (relationshipCache.GetValueOrDefault(rel))
69	            {
70	                case ResolvedByInstalling resInstalling:
71	                    candidates.Add(resInstalling.installing);
72	                    break;
73	
74	                case ResolvedByInstalled resInstalled:
75	                    candidates.Add(resInstalled.installed);
76	                    break;
77	
78	                case ResolvedByNew resRel:
79	                    // We need to have this loop at this level to accumulate the list of candidates
80	                    foreach ((CkanModule module, ResolvedRelationship[] rrs) in resRel.resolved)
81	                    {
82	                        if (installing.Any(m => m.identifier == module.identifier
83	                                                && m.version != module.version))
84	                        {
85	                            // Skip other versions of mods being installed
86	                        }
87	                        else if (module.BadRelationships(installing)
88	                                  .Select(r => relationshipCache.GetValueOrDefault(r.Descriptor))
89	                                  .OfType<ResolvedRelationship>()
90	                                  .Select(badRR => new ResolvedRelationship[] { resRel, badRR })
91	                                  .ToArray()
92	                            is { Length: > 0 } badRels)
93	                        {
94	                            unresolved.AddRange(badRels);
95	                        }
96	                        else if (rrs.SelectMany(subRR => subRR.BadRelationships(installing))
97	                                    .Select(tuple => tuple.Item2.Type == RelationshipType.Depends
98	                                                     && relationshipCache.TryGetValue(tuple.Item2.Descriptor,
99	                                                                                      out ResolvedRelationship? leaf)
100	                                                         ? tuple.Item1.Prepend(resRel).Append(leaf).ToArray()
101	                                                         : tuple.Item1.Prepend(resRel).ToArray())
102	                                    .ToArray()
103	                                 is { Length: > 0 } badRRs)
104	                        {
105	                            unresolved.AddRange(badRRs);
106	                        }
107	                        else
108	                        {
109	                            candidates.Add(module);
110	                        }
111	                    }
112	                    break;
113	            }
114	            if (candidates.Count == 0)
115	            {
116	                if (unresolved.Count > 0)
117	                {
118	                    throw new DependenciesNotSatisfiedKraken(unresolved, registry, game, this);
119	                }
120	                else
121	                {
122	                    throw new InconsistentKraken(string.Format(Properties.Resources.ResolvedRelationshipsTreeUnsatisfied,
123	                                                               rel,
124	                                                               string.Join(Environment.NewLine,
125	                                                                           installing.OrderBy(i => i.identifier))));
126	                }
127	            }
128	            return candidates;
129	        }

136	        private static IEnumerable<ResolvedRelationship> ResolveManyCached(IReadOnlyCollection<CkanModule> modules,
137	                                                                           IRegistryQuerier                registry,
138	                                                                           IReadOnlyCollection<string>     dlls,
139	                                                                           IReadOnlyCollection<CkanModule> installed,
140	                                                                           StabilityToleranceConfig        stabilityTolerance,
141	                                                                           GameVersionCriteria             crit,
142	                                                                           OptionalRelationships           optRels,
143	                                                                           RelationshipCache               relationshipCache)
144	            => modules.SelectMany(m => ResolveModule(m, modules, modules, registry, dlls, installed, stabilityTolerance, crit, optRels,
145	                                                     relationshipCache));

147	        private static IEnumerable<ResolvedRelationship> ResolveRelationships(CkanModule                      module,
148	                                                                              List<RelationshipDescriptor>?   relationships,
149	                                                                              SelectionReason                 reason,
150	                                                                              IReadOnlyCollection<CkanModule> definitelyInstalling,
151	                                                                              IReadOnlyCollection<CkanModule> allInstalling,
152	                                                                              IRegistryQuerier                registry,
153	                                                                              IReadOnlyCollection<string>     dlls,
154	                                                                              IReadOnlyCollection<CkanModule> installed,
155	                                                                              StabilityToleranceConfig        stabilityTolerance,
156	                                                                              GameVersionCriteria             crit,
157	                                                                              OptionalRelationships           optRels,
158	                                                                              RelationshipCache               relationshipCache)
159	            => relationships?.Select(dep => Resolve(module, dep, reason,
160	                                                    definitelyInstalling, allInstalling, registry, dlls, installed,
161	                                                    stabilityTolerance, crit, optRels, relationshipCache))
162	                            ?? Enumerable.Empty<ResolvedRelationship>();
163	
164	        private static ResolvedRelationship Resolve(CkanModule                      source,
165	                                                    RelationshipDescriptor          relationship,
166	                                                    SelectionReason                 reason,
167	                                                    IReadOnlyCollection<CkanModule> definitelyInstalling,
168	                                                    IReadOnlyCollection<CkanModule> allInstalling,
169	                                                    IRegistryQuerier                registry,
170	                                                    IReadOnlyCollection<string>     dlls,
171	                                                    IReadOnlyCollection<CkanModule> installed,
172	                                                    StabilityToleranceConfig        stabilityTolerance,
173	                                                    GameVersionCriteria             crit,
174	                                                    OptionalRelationships           optRels,
175	                                                    RelationshipCache               relationshipCache)
176	            => relationshipCache.GetOrAdd(relationship,
177	                                          rel => rel.MatchesAny(installed, dlls, registry.InstalledDlc,
178	                                                                out CkanModule? installedMatch)
179	                                                     ? installedMatch == null
180	                                                         ? new ResolvedByDLL(source, rel, reason)
181	                                                         : new ResolvedByInstalled(source, rel, reason, installedMatch)
182	
183	                                               : rel.MatchesAny(allInstalling, null, null,
184	                                                                out CkanModule? installingMatch)
185	                                                 && installingMatch != null
186	                                                     ? new ResolvedByInstalling(source, rel, reason, installingMatch)
187	
188	                                               : new ResolvedByNew(source, rel, reason,
189	                                                                   rel.LatestAvailableWithProvides(registry, stabilityTolerance, crit,
190	                                                                                                   installed, definitelyInstalling),
191	                                                                   definitelyInstalling, allInstalling.Append(source).ToArray(),
192	                                                                   registry, dlls, installed, stabilityTolerance,
193	                                                                   crit, optRels, relationshipCache))
194	                                .WithSource(source, reason);
195	
196	        private readonly ResolvedRelationship[] resolved;
197	        private readonly RelationshipCache      relationshipCache = new RelationshipCache();
198	    }

content.text:
Implemented the fix in `Core/Relationships/RelationshipResolver.cs`.

Summary:
- The optional `recommends`/`suggests` resolution path now avoids using already-added optional modules as an exclusion filter when `proceed_with_inconsistencies` is enabled.
- This prevents an earlier optional mod with conflicts from hiding later optional mods in the stanza.
- Dependency/conflict behavior outside this optional inconsistency-reporting mode is unchanged.

Validation performed:
- Added temporary regression tests reproducing the issue for both `recommends` and `suggests`.
- Confirmed they failed before the fix.
- Confirmed they passed after the fix.
- Removed the temporary regression tests as requested.
- Ran the targeted resolver test suite successfully:

```text
dotnet test /testbed/Tests/Tests.csproj -p:NuGetAudit=false --framework net8.0 --filter "FullyQualifiedName~Tests.Core.Relationships.RelationshipResolverTests"

Passed! - Failed: 0, Passed: 69, Skipped: 0, Total: 69
```

Note:
- The initial unqualified test run hit environment/project issues:
  - NuGet audit warning-as-error for `log4net`
  - Windows desktop framework reference unavailable on this Linux environment
- I used `-p:NuGetAudit=false --framework net8.0` to run the relevant tests successfully.

No commits were made.
